title: Simplified Process for Internal Market Movements (SPIMM) and UK Carrier (UKC) Scheme: Customs Simplified Procedures Guidance
body: "Use this guidance to identify:     which Procedure and Additional Procedure Codes are excluded from use with Customs Simplified Procedures when moving goods under SPIMM and UKC  the Declaration Completion Instructions for SPIMM Aggregated Supplementary Declarations the Declaration Completion Instructions for SPIMM Recapitulative Supplementary Declarations   "

taxons.title: UK Trade Tariff and classification of goods
